message:
bd-3iws: Add pager module for graceful paging integration

Add a simple pager module that:
- Pipes content through less with ANSI support (-R -F -X)
- Falls back gracefully if less is unavailable
- Respects --no-interactive flag via PagerConfig

The pager module provides the infrastructure for scenes to optionally
page long content. Currently the markdown scene renders inline, but the
pager can be integrated when interactive paging is needed.

Acceptance criteria met:
- Pager does not crash if less is missing (falls back to inline)
- --no-interactive disables pager usage entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
